[िव榀ापन-III/4/असा./486/16] -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART III—SEC. 4] CENTRAL UNIVERSITY OF ORISSA, KORAPUT NOTIFICATION Koraput, the 24th March, 2017 No. VCO/CVO/2017/168.—The following is published for general information :— STATUTES AND ORDINANCES ORDINACE - 6 NORMS/REGULATIONS FOR PROMOTION/ CAREER ADVANCEMENT OF ASSOCIATE PROFESSORS AND ASSISTANT PROFESSORS In exercise of the powers vested in Section 28(1)(0) of the University Act, the Executive Council on the proposal made by the Academic council hereby makes the following Ordinance prescribing the norms/ Regulations for promotion/ career advancement of Associate Professors and Assistant professors in Central University of Orissa. The Promotion / career advancement of Assistant Professors and Associate Professors in the University shall be governed by the Norms/ Regulations prescribed by the University Grants Commission in vogue and as amended from time to time. (Approved by the Executive Council in its 6th Meeting held on 30.09.2010 Vide No. ITEM: EC: 06-4/4 at New Delhi) Prof. SACHIDANANDA MOHANTY, Vice Chancellor [ADVT.-III/4/Exty./486/16] Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
